metric_value: In excess of $24 billion; fastest growing IT segment
notes: Aberdeen estimate of total networking market.

metric_value: Routing switches replacing routers in enterprise LAN core; ~10x capacity at ~1/10 cost
notes: Price-performance ratio of 100x vs. traditional software routers stated.

metric_value: Verify actual adoption rates by 2000-2002.
notes: Verify actual adoption rates by 2000-2002.

metric_name: Fast Ethernet adoption as upgrade path
metric_value: Fast Ethernet adopted as primary upgrade from 10 Mbps; 10/100 NIC prices at 10 Mbps levels
notes: Broad consensus observation.

metric_value: Gigabit Ethernet is attractive alternative to ATM for Ethernet backbone users; ATM not accepted end-to-end
notes: Aberdeen favors Gigabit Ethernet for non-voice/video networks.

metric_value: ATM posted healthy growth in 1997 as WAN and LAN backbone but failed as end-to-end desktop technology
notes: Too costly and complicated for desktop; niche WAN/backbone role confirmed.

metric_value: Wireless occupies niche; 802.11 ratification improves interoperability; bandwidth approaching 10 Mbps
notes: Vertical market adoption: healthcare

metric_value: VPNs using tunneling/security protocols turn public Internet into private WAN at fraction of private line costs
notes: Convergence of Internet and corporate WAN infrastructure noted.

metric_value: Overall revenue growth not to exceed 15% due to price declines and Y2K resource diversion
notes: Softening from prior years; Asia slowdown partly offset by European acceleration.

metric_value: Intel and Compaq making successful networking debuts; driven by high-volume/low-cost manufacturing
notes: Commoditization trend; hubs and NICs already commodity.

metric_value: Cisco profiled as dominant enterprise router and switch vendor; major internetworking supplier
notes: Listed as top of major internetworking suppliers.

metric_value: 3Com holds 40% NIC market share; leads Ethernet managed hubs and Fast Ethernet workgroup hubs
notes: Over 100 million customers worldwide.

metric_value: Workgroup switch prices dropped; switches replacing hubs; hubs survive as low-end SOHO/SME product
notes: Prices approaching commodity; sales volumes may increase but revenue declining.

metric_value: Y2K compliance overlooked for network components; critical for hub/router/switch firmware; worst in SME
notes: Network components on off-the-shelf PC platforms especially at risk.

metric_value: Internet adoption inverted 80/20 traffic rule — now 80% of traffic crosses backbone; bursty and unpredictable
notes: Push apps like PointCast added unplanned corporate traffic.

metric_value: Converged networks (voice/video/data) will not become widespread for several more years due to quality/uncertainty
notes: 99.999% reliability expectation from users once convergence occurs.

metric_value: As network complexity increases more IT orgs consider outsourcing; particularly remote access
notes: IT expertise shortage driving this trend.

metric_value: xDSL technologies emerged; 128 Kbps IDSL to 7 Mbps ADSL; not yet widely deployed or geographically available
notes: Cable modems offer 30 Mbps downstream but more residential; asymmetrical.

metric_value: SOHO is fastest growing segment; 90% of businesses worldwide; ~40% use Internet as part of business
notes: Service providers courted as new indirect channel for SOHO equipment.

metric_value: ~45 million US households with home computers; ~25% own more than one PC; nascent home networking market
notes: Price-sensitive; 10 Mbps shared sufficient for most home needs.

metric_value: Bay Networks profiled as major internetworking supplier; acquired by Nortel Networks
notes: Listed alongside Cisco/3Com/Cabletron as major supplier.

metric_value: Alteon profiled as high-speed networking newcomer focused on Gigabit Ethernet switches
notes: Part of new entrant group displacing established vendors.

metric_value: DWDM enables up to 1 terabit on single fiber; will remove WAN bottleneck; stimulate enterprise bandwidth demand
notes: Interoperability work still needed; long-term prediction.
